Description/Title: Ensure ESXi host patches are up-to-date
Ensure vCenter Server patches are up-to-date
Ensure VIB acceptance level is configured properly
Ensure no unauthorized kernel modules are loaded
Ensure default salt is configured properly
Ensure image profile VIB acceptance levels are verified
Ensure BIOS/UEFI settings are configured securely
Ensure secure boot is enabled
Ensure no unauthorized devices are connected
Ensure proper time synchronization
Ensure host profiles are used for configuration management
Ensure vSphere Update Manager is configured
Ensure ESXi host software is from trusted sources
Ensure vCenter Server is properly licensed
Ensure NTP time synchronization is configured
Ensure ESXi host time is synchronized with authoritative time source
Ensure ESXi host firewall is properly configured
Ensure default firewall rules are configured properly
Ensure firewall rules are restrictive
Ensure MOB is disabled
Ensure default self-signed certificate is not used
Ensure expired or revoked certificates are not used
Ensure SNMP is configured properly
Ensure dvfilter network APIs are configured properly
Ensure vSphere Authentication Proxy is used when adding hosts to Active Directory
Ensure VDS health check is disabled
Ensure persistent logging is configured
Ensure centralized ESXi host dumps are configured
Ensure remote logging is configured
Ensure syslog rotation is configured
Ensure vCenter Server logging is configured
Ensure vCenter Server log retention is configured
Ensure audit logging is enabled
Ensure audit logs are protected from unauthorized access
Ensure log correlation and analysis is configured
Ensure SSH access is properly configured
Ensure SSH host key checking is enabled
Ensure SSH protocol 2 is used
Ensure SSH idle timeout is configured
Ensure SSH max authentication attempts is set
Ensure ESXi Shell is disabled
Ensure password complexity is enforced
Ensure password reuse is limited
Ensure account lockout is configured
Ensure Active Directory authentication is used
Ensure only authorized users belong to esxAdminsGroup
Ensure exception users are configured properly
Ensure vCenter Server permissions are configured properly
Ensure vCenter Server roles are configured properly
Ensure ESXi host local user accounts are configured properly
Ensure default ESXi admin account is secured
Ensure certificate-based authentication is used
Ensure multi-factor authentication is enabled
Ensure DCUI timeout is set to 600 seconds or more
Ensure ESXi shell interactive timeout is configured
Ensure ESXi shell timeout is configured
Ensure SSH authorized keys file is empty
Ensure lockdown mode is enabled
Ensure strict lockdown mode is enabled
Ensure DCUI has trusted users for lockdown mode
Ensure CIM access is limited
Ensure contents of exposed configuration files are not modified
Ensure system resource allocation is configured
Ensure Storage I/O Control is enabled
Ensure bidirectional CHAP authentication for iSCSI traffic is enabled
Ensure uniqueness of CHAP authentication secrets for iSCSI traffic
Ensure SAN resources are segregated properly
Ensure datastore access is controlled
Ensure storage encryption is enabled
Ensure vSwitch security policies are configured
Ensure vSwitch forged transmits policy is set to reject
Ensure vSwitch MAC address change policy is set to reject
Ensure vSwitch promiscuous mode policy is set to reject
Ensure port groups are not configured to VLAN 0 or 4095
Ensure port groups are not configured to native VLAN
Ensure port groups are not configured to reserved VLANs
Ensure Virtual Distributed Switch Netflow traffic is sent to authorized collector
Ensure port-level configuration overrides are disabled
Ensure network isolation is properly configured
Ensure network redundancy is configured
Ensure network security policies are applied consistently
Ensure VM hardware version is current
Ensure VM tools are up to date
Ensure VM remote console connections are limited
Ensure VM console copy operations are disabled
Ensure VM console drag and drop operations are disabled
Ensure VM console paste operations are disabled
Ensure VM console GUI options are disabled
Ensure unnecessary floppy devices are removed
Ensure unnecessary CD/DVD devices are disconnected
Ensure unnecessary parallel ports are disconnected
Ensure unnecessary serial ports are disabled
Ensure unnecessary USB devices are disconnected
Ensure unauthorized modification of devices is disabled
Ensure unauthorized connection of devices is disabled
Ensure PCI and PCIe device passthrough is disabled
Ensure VM limits are configured correctly
Ensure hardware-based 3D acceleration is disabled
Ensure non-persistent disks are limited
Ensure virtual disk shrinking is disabled
Ensure virtual disk wiping is disabled
Ensure VM log file number is configured properly
Ensure VM log file size is limited
Ensure host information is not sent to guests
Ensure VM isolation features are configured
Ensure VM encryption is enabled where required
